settings.text: Five practice areas under one retainer — helpdesk, networking, security, cloud, and backup. Pick the layers you need; we run the rest as a single stack.

settings.title: What we run for you.
settings.description: Pick a pillar for a deep dive on how we deliver it in practice.

settings.title: Helpdesk
settings.description: A named team your staff can call, chat, or email — answered inside fifteen minutes during business hours, with after-hours escalation for outages. We triage, resolve, and document every ticket so you have a real record of what happened.

settings.title: Managed networking
settings.description: Switches, access points, firewalls, and VPN — procured, configured, monitored, and patched. We run the LAN as a single managed system with real-time alerts instead of a pile of vendor portals.

settings.title: Cybersecurity
settings.description: Endpoint detection, email filtering, multi-factor enforcement, security awareness training, and quarterly vulnerability reviews. Aligned to the controls your cyber-insurance renewal is going to ask about.

settings.title: Cloud & productivity
settings.description: Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace — identity, licensing, SharePoint or Drive, and Intune or MDM device enrollment. Migrations handled in stages so nobody loses access to their inbox mid-week.

settings.title: Backup & disaster recovery
settings.description: Backups of workstations, servers, and cloud mailboxes, tested on a schedule — not just configured and forgotten. Documented recovery runbooks so a ransomware event turns into a rebuild, not a ransom.

settings.title: 24/7 monitoring
settings.description: Endpoints, servers, and network devices monitored around the clock. Alerts route to an on-call engineer — not an unwatched dashboard.

settings.title: Patch management
settings.description: Operating system, browser, and third-party patches reviewed and deployed on a rolling weekly cadence, with emergency patches inside twenty-four hours.

settings.title: Asset & licence tracking
settings.description: A single ledger of every device, user, and subscription you own — with warranty, renewal, and end-of-life dates so nothing expires unnoticed.

settings.title: Quarterly business review
settings.description: A ninety-minute session every quarter where we walk through ticket trends, upcoming renewals, security posture, and the next two quarters of IT spend.

settings.title: vCIO consult
settings.description: Strategic guidance — budgets, vendor selection, compliance readiness — from a senior engineer who already knows your environment, not a stranger on a sales call.

settings.title: Still unsure? Talk to us.
settings.text:
A thirty-minute assessment call will clarify which pillars matter for your setup — and whether you need all of them.

No obligation, no sales pressure.

settings.question: Do we have to take every service?
settings.answer: No. Most clients start with helpdesk plus security and add networking or cloud when a refresh or migration is on the table. The retainer scales to the pillars you enable.

settings.question: How do you work alongside an internal IT lead?
settings.answer: Co-managed is a common setup. Your lead keeps strategic control and project work; we take helpdesk overflow, after-hours, and the 24/7 monitoring stack.

settings.question: What happens on day one if something goes down?
settings.answer: During business hours, a named engineer picks up inside fifteen minutes. After hours, the emergency line routes to an on-call engineer with remote access to your environment.

settings.question: Are you Microsoft or Google shop?
settings.answer: Both. Microsoft 365 is the majority of our book, Google Workspace is the rest. We'll run whichever stack fits your team and keep migrations clean when you need to switch.

settings.question: What about compliance — HIPAA, SOC 2, cyber-insurance?
settings.answer: We align controls to the framework your auditor or insurer asks for and produce the evidence packets at renewal. We don't issue attestations, but we make them cheaper to obtain.

settings.text: Thirty minutes with a senior engineer. Walk away with a clear picture of your gaps — whether you hire us or not.
